item.title: A comprehensive guide to Causal Forest - How it works and how to apply it
item.description: Causal forest gains attention as a powerful tool to add a machine learning perspective to empirical studies. This article sheds light on the method by answering How does causal forest work and how to apply it? The implementation in R from Athey et al. (2019) will be applied to data from an educational randomized intervention on grit by Alan et al. (2019). Emphasis is on procedures and fundamentals of causal forest understand model parameters how to apply it to data interpreting its output Further posts will follow on heterogeneity analyses, parameter tuning, another proposal for replicable models and how model parameters such as honesty and num.

item.title: Design Recommender Systems with Recommenderlab
item.description: Build your own recommender system with Recommenderlab I show Recommenderlab's scope to customize recommender algorithms and discuss how to compare different recommender techniques.
